source.name: Chapter 1.4: 6.4 Knowledge Check - transfer_money flow order
source.instructions: **What is the correct order of steps in the transfer_money flow?**

answers.answer: Collect amount, then recipient, then account_from, then action_process_transfer
Collect all three slots in any order in one step
action_process_transfer, then collect amount, recipient, account_from

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT identify transfer_money flow step order
source.guidance: The flow collects amount, then recipient, then account_from, then runs action_process_transfer.
